title: salix × oleifolia
intro: Salix × oleifolia, also known as the weeping willow, is a hybrid deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections. The health benefits of Salix × oleifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
